fontFamily.description: Form font family — body font so unstyled slotted text (legends, paragraphs) renders consistently

backgroundColor.description: Base surface color for the loading overlay. Used with 85% opacity via CSS color-mix(). References the raised surface so the overlay always matches the form's background.

default.description: Loading overlay opacity in default (light) mode — semi-transparent warm surface

dark.description: Loading overlay opacity in dark mode — slightly more transparent to keep depth readable

reducedMotion.description: Loading overlay opacity when prefers-reduced-motion is active — higher opacity since there is no blur/animation to signal loading state

darkReducedMotion.description: Loading overlay opacity in dark mode + prefers-reduced-motion — balanced between dark.opacity and reducedMotion.opacity
